threats.title: TeamPCP Compromises Checkmarx Jenkins AST Plugin Weeks After KICS Supply Chain Attack
threats.summary: Checkmarx has confirmed that a modified version of the Jenkins AST plugin was published to the Jenkins Marketplace. "If you are using Checkmarx Jenkins AST plugin, you need to ensure that you are using the version 2.0.13-829.vc72453fa_1c16 that was published on December 17, 2025 or previously," the cybersecurity company said in a statement over the weekend. threats.title: cPanel CVE-2026-41940 Under Active Exploitation to Deploy Filemanager Backdoor
threats.summary: A threat actor named Mr_Rot13 has been attributed to the exploitation of a recently disclosed critical cPanel flaw to deploy a backdoor codenamed Filemanager on compromised environments. threats.title: Hackers Used AI to Develop First Known Zero-Day 2FA Bypass for Mass Exploitation

threats.title: Your Purple Team Isn't Purple — It's Just Red and Blue in the Same Room
threats.summary: Defending a network at 2 am looks a lot like this: an analyst copy-pasting a hash from a PDF into a SIEM query.
